description: Plugin-distributed hooks for localization-i18n-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags i18n anti-patterns (hard-coded user-facing strings, string concatenation, if-count-1 plurals, hard-coded date/number/currency formats). Set L10N_I18N_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
